de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class SequentViewLogicPrinter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.LogicPrinter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.SequentViewLogicPrinter

  • public class SequentViewLogicPrinter
extends LogicPrinter
    Subclass of LogicPrinter used in GUI. Any GUI-specific code for pretty-printing should be put in here, so that code of LogicPrinter stays independent of GUI as much as possible.
    Author:
    Kai Wallisch

    • Method Detail

      • getVisibleTermLabels

        protected ImmutableArray<TermLabel> getVisibleTermLabels(Term t)
        Description copied from class: LogicPrinter
        Determine the Set of labels that will be printed out for a specific Term. The class SequentViewLogicPrinter overrides this method. TermLabel visibility can be configured via GUI, see TermLabelMenu. Default is to print all TermLabels.
        Overrides:
        getVisibleTermLabels in class LogicPrinter
        Parameters:
        t - Term whose visible TermLabels will be determined.
        Returns:
        List of visible TermLabels, i.e. labels that are syntactically added to a Term while printing.

      • printClassName

        public void printClassName(String className)
                    throws IOException
        Overrides:
        printClassName in class LogicPrinter
        Throws:
        IOException
